item.title: Endpoint Security Platform for Extensions, Packages & MCPs | Koi
item.description: Koi gives security teams full visibility & control over extensions, packages, and more. Detect risks, enforce policy, and protect endpoints.

item.title: Chat with Koi Security | Expert Software Protection
item.description: Chat with Koi Security experts to discuss software, AI, and browser extension risks, policy enforcement, and enterprise security strategy.

item.title: Our Story and Security Approach | Koi
item.description: Learn how Koi helps enterprises identify, assess, and control software, AI, and browser extension risk with continuous visibility and governance.

item.title: Privacy Policy | Koi Security
item.description: Understand how Koi collects, processes, stores, and protects customer and enterprise data across its platform, products, and services.

item.title: Koi: Cookie Policy
item.description: Koi: Cookie Policy

item.title: Terms & Conditions | Koi Security
item.description: Review the legal terms and conditions governing access to and use of Koi’s website, platform, products, services, and related offerings.

item.title: Unified Endpoint & MCP Security | Koi
item.description: A centralized security platform for endpoint, browser extension, and MCP security with full discovery, control, and policy enforcement.

item.title: Software & Extension Security Discovery | Koi
item.description: Discover all self-provisioned software, browser extensions, and AI tools with continuous visibility into hidden risks across enterprise environments.

item.title: Security Policy Enforcement for Software | Koi
item.description: Define, manage, and enforce security policies across AI usage, software, and browser extensions with centralized, real-time governance.

item.title: Approval Workflows for AI & Software Risk | Koi
item.description: Approve or block AI tools, browser extensions, and software installs using structured security workflows designed for enterprise control.

item.title: Chat with Koi Security | Expert Software Protection
item.description: Chat with Koi Security experts to discuss software, AI, and browser extension risks, policy enforcement, and enterprise security strategy.

item.title: Risk Research & Threat Insights | Koi
item.description: Deep research and expert insights on software supply chain risk, browser extensions, AI security, MCP threats, and enterprise risks.

item.title: Wall of Koi | Koi
item.description: Discover the latest insights from Koi - covering endpoint protection, governance of third-party software, and strategies for evolving enterprise security.

item.title: Join Our Pond | Koi
item.description: Join Our Pond | Koi

item.title: The MCP Backdoor: How Malware Slips In Through Developer Tools - Koi
item.description: In this webinar we unpack the first malicious MCP server discovered in the wild and show how security teams can detect and mitigate this emerging class of risk before it spreads.

item.title: Endpoint Security Platform for AI & SaaS Risk | Koi
item.description: Discover and control AI tools, SaaS apps, and MCP usage on employee endpoints with continuous visibility and policy enforcement.

item.title: Browser Extension Security with Deep Risk Analysis | Koi
item.description: Analyze browser extension code to uncover hidden behavior, supply-chain risks, and real security impact beyond permissions.

item.title: MCP & Software Supply Chain Gateway | Koi
item.description: Control marketplace installs and block risky software at source with Koi’s proactive Gateway for secure software intake.

item.title: General Roadmap Session
item.description: Chat with Koi Security experts to discuss software, AI, and browser extension risks, policy enforcement, and enterprise security strategy.

item.title: Koipid Challenge Winner - Bar Tov - Koi
